overall.description: Stationary first-person view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night, featuring a television cycling through various colorful advertisements. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing a high-end residential space with modern furnishings, ambient aquarium lighting, and a large window overlooking the dark cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bedroom with entertainment center and aquarium

events.description: television screen transitions to yellow advertisement with 'setsail' branding
television displays animated character with pink hair against purple background
television switches to white monochrome advertisement with product imagery
television returns to colorful animated graphics with rainbow effects

agents.ego_description: stationary on the bed, watching the television as it cycles through various advertisements

entered.detail: messy bed with white sheets, pillows, and a magazine resting on the covers
large windows with horizontal blinds revealing dark nighttime cityscape outside
large flatscreen TV on dark cabinet displaying cycling neon advertisements and animations
long wall-mounted fish tank with blue-green ambient lighting and visible aquatic plants
curved ceiling with horizontal wooden slats and recessed spot lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed in a cyberpunk apartment bedroom, focused on a television that continuously cycles through colorful advertisements. The room features an unmade bed in the foreground, a large window with blinds showing the dark city outside, and an illuminated aquarium providing ambient lighting. The television displays various content including animated characters, product advertisements, and abstract graphics throughout the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom as the focal point of the room shifts through a series of vibrant digital displays. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the foreground, while an illuminated aquarium casts a soft ambient glow across the modern furnishings. As the camera remains fixed, the attention is drawn to a television that continuously cycles through a kaleidoscope of colorful advertisements, animated characters, and abstract graphics. The scene persists in this atmospheric stillness, contrasting the flickering light of the screen against the dark, blind-covered window overlooking the city.
